resources.string: Ranked by cost per ounce of alcohol

Type or paste a shelf tag, e.g.
MILLER LITE
30 PK 12 OZ CANS
$22.99
No deals yet — add a shelf tag above, or load the samples.
Type or paste a shelf tag first.
Tag is missing: %1$s. Add it and try again.
